output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?dance ?danceLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q7433313 wdt:P155 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P1543 14 .
  ?season wdt:P1385 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P937 ?performance .
  ?performance wdt:P1635 ?score .
  FILTER(?score = 28)
  ?performance wdt:P1721 ?dance .
  ?dance wdt:P279 + wd:Q5014 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?dance rdfs:label ?danceLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?danceLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
